subcodes.first_line: We have sent down the verses and made manifest that which lay hidden in the Books of God, the Lord of creation. How many a servant hath arisen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انزلنا الایات و اظهرنا ما کان مکنونا فی کتب الله مالک الایجاد کم من عبد قام علی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @justice and wrath of God
